Item.title: Item
Item.description: An inventory item tracked in the daily archive system.

name.description: The unique or primary name of the inventory item.

latestPerson.description: Name of the person who last checked the item.

ownerId.description: The UID of the user who owns or imported this item.

InventoryRecord.title: Inventory Record
InventoryRecord.description: A specific historical inventory entry for an item.

itemName.description: Denormalized item name for fast reads.

inventoryDate.description: Date when inventory was performed (YYYY-MM-DD or readable format).

personName.description: The individual who performed this inventory check.

additionalFields.description: Flexible key-value map for other CSV column values.

ownerId.description: UID of the user who imported this record.

/items/{itemId}.description: Primary inventory item details tracked globally.

/items/{itemId}/records/{recordId}.description: Historical inventory check entries for a specific item.
